title: Delicious Gooey Norwegian Paneer Casserole
description: A floral and gooey lacto-vegetarian Norwegian dish featuring paneer, perfect for curing hangovers. This casserole is a hearty and comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the onion and mushrooms until they are softened.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, milk, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the crumbled paneer to the bowl and stir until it is well combined with the wet ingredients.
Add the cooked onion and mushroom mixture to the bowl and stir until it is well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with chopped parsley.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot and enjoy.
